tagline: Pool Repair and Cleaning. We Got You Covered.

hero.headline:
Your Pool, Our Personal
Promise
hero.subheadline: Dan and Debbie personally service every pool -- no employees, no shortcuts, no surprises. Just sparkling water and peace of mind from a family that treats your pool like their own.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Complete Pool Care From<br class="hidden md:block">People Who Show Up
services.subtitle: No revolving door of technicians. No skipped visits. Just Dan and Debbie delivering consistent, thorough pool care week after week.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Service
cards.description: Full water testing, chemical balancing, equipment inspection, brushing, vacuuming, and netting. Your pool stays swim-ready every single week, starting at $150/month.

cards.title: Filter Cleaning
cards.description: Professional D.E. and cartridge filter cleaning with full disassembly, deep cleaning, and O-ring inspection. Recommended 1-3 times per year for peak performance.

cards.title: Chemical Treatments
cards.description: Targeted shock, stabilizer, algaecide, and phosphate remover treatments to tackle stubborn water quality issues that go beyond routine weekly maintenance.

cards.title: Parts & Repair
cards.description: Skimmer baskets, pump baskets, gaskets, and essential equipment parts replaced quickly so your pool system stays running without costly downtime.

cards.title: Equipment Inspection
cards.description: Thorough checks of pumps, filters, heaters, and plumbing during every visit. We catch small problems before they become expensive repairs.

cards.title: Seasonal Pool Care
cards.description: Monsoon prep, post-storm cleanup, and seasonal adjustments tailored to Arizona's extreme heat. Your pool stays balanced year-round.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to a Sparkling Pool

steps.title: Call Dan & Debbie
steps.description: Tell us about your pool and your needs. We will provide an honest, straightforward quote -- no pressure, no upselling. Owner responds personally within 24 hours.

steps.title: We Show Up — Every Time
steps.description: The owner arrives on schedule, performs a complete service, and documents everything onsite. No random employees, no missed visits, no excuses.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Sparkling Pool
steps.description: Your pool stays crystal clear, safe, and swim-ready week after week. If anything is not right, we come back and fix it -- that is our personal guarantee.

about.label: Why Sun City Trusts Us
about.headline: Family-Owned, Owner-Operated — That Is Our Difference
about.description: Since 2015, Dan and Debbie Smith have personally cared for pools across Sun City. No employees, no subcontractors -- just the owners, on every visit, building real relationships with every homeowner they serve. As a Sun City HOA Approved Business Partner and Nextdoor Neighborhood Fave, we have earned our reputation one sparkling pool at a time.

features.title: Owner on Every Visit
features.description: Dan personally services every pool. No employee turnover, no inconsistent quality -- just the same trusted professional every single week.

features.title: Detailed Service Reports
features.description: You receive onsite documentation after every visit showing exactly what was done, what was tested, and what your pool needs.

features.title: Satisfaction Guaranteed
features.description: Not happy with any service? We come back and make it right at no charge. We have built 11 years of trust on that promise.

pricing.headline: Straightforward Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Weekly pool service starts at $150/month. No hidden fees, no long-term contracts -- just honest, reliable care.

guarantee.headline: Our "Sparkling Pool" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you are not completely satisfied with any service visit, call us and we will return to make it right at no additional cost. Dan and Debbie personally stand behind every single visit. We have maintained a perfect 5.0 Google rating because we never leave until the job is done right.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start weekly service?
faqs.answer: Most new clients are added to our schedule within one week. Just give us a call and Dan will personally assess your pool and get you set up.

faqs.question: Do I need to be home during service?
faqs.answer: Not at all. Most of our homeowners provide gate access and we take care of everything. You will receive detailed service documentation after every visit so you know exactly what was done.

faqs.question: Who actually services my pool?
faqs.answer: Dan, the owner, personally performs every service call. That is our biggest differentiator -- you never have to deal with employee turnover or wonder who is in your backyard.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve Sun City, Sun City West, Phoenix, and Scottsdale, Arizona. Our focus on a select group of homeowners means you get personal attention, not assembly-line service.

faqs.question: What is included in weekly pool service?
faqs.answer: Everything: full water testing, chemical balancing, equipment inspection, O-ring lubrication, filter backwashing, basket emptying, brushing of steps, benches, tile lines and walls, vacuuming, netting, and onsite documentation. Starting at $150/month.

testimonials.name: Thomas P.
testimonials.text: Clean & Brite is our weekly and trusted pool maintenance service. Dan showed us everything and explained the process during our filter cleaning. Took before and after pictures. Highly recommend this family owned business.

testimonials.name: Terry H.
testimonials.text: This is the best pool service we've ever had. They are on top of everything. The owner is the one who does the service so you don't have to worry about turnover.

testimonials.name: Diane B.
testimonials.text: I have finally found the perfect answer to my pool maintenance problem. Clean & Brite, owned and operated by Debbie and Dan. They are both professional and thorough, and within my price range. I recommend them to anyone.

contact.headline:
Ready for a Pool That
Stays Sparkling?
contact.subtitle: Get a free, no-pressure pool assessment from Dan personally. No contracts, no commitments -- just honest advice from a family that cares about your pool.
benefits: Free pool assessment with every quote
